data.title: Christina Lake Cannabis (CSE: CLC) sold 99 acres of land in BC for $551,000 to boost working capital.
data.description: Christina Lake Cannabis Corp. recently announced the sale of 99 acres of non-core land located in Christina Lake, British Columbia. The sale yielded $551,000 which will be allocated towards supporting the company's working capital.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics grants 97,710 stock options to 17 new employees on Jan 15, 2026, focusing on TIL therapies for cancer.
data.description: On Jan. 16, 2026, in SAN CARLOS, Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA), a biotech firm specializing in pioneering polyclonal TIL therapies for cancer patients, revealed the approval on Jan. 15, 2026, of granting inducement stock options. This encompasses 97,710 shares of the Company's common stock, distributed among 17 fresh non-executive hires.

data.title: Speakeasy Dispensary in Lexington, KY received a strong turnout on opening day for medical cannabis program. Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Kentucky's medical cannabis program reached a significant milestone as Speakeasy Dispensary began serving registered patients in Lexington on January 15, 2026. The operation saw a strong turnout of patients eager to access medical cannabis products. The efficient opening highlighted the success of the program, indicating growing support and demand. This development reflects the progress and positive impact of Kentucky's initiative, with notable numbers of patients benefiting from the accessible medical cannabis options now available to them.
Rick Larsen reports new stock trades with WM, ESS, VRSK, and MDLZ.

data.title: AHF's activism celebrated through AR art at 2-night exhibition in Hollywood on Jan 20 and 21.
data.description: Los Angeles (BUSINESS WIRE) - An exclusive 2-night art exhibition titled "Bloom: Celebrating AHF’s Activism Through Augmented Reality and Art" will be held in Hollywood on January 20 and 21. The event aims to showcase AHF's activism through art and augmented reality.
New stock trades by Jim Jordan revealed, including CBSI. #updates

data.title: Itafos Inc. appoints Joseph McConnell to its Board of Directors, replacing Isaiah Toback. Effective January 16, 2026.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Itafos Inc. (TSX-V: IFOS) (OTCQX: ITFS) appointed Joseph McConnell to its Board of Directors, replacing Isaiah Toback. This nomination by principal shareholder CL Fertilizers Holding LLC ("CLF") is in accordance with an investor rights agreement. Mr. McConnell's inclusion on the board is effective immediately.

data.title: Life Time announces 2026 athletic events lineup, offers early registration to members. Empowering health and happiness.
data.description: Life Time, a provider of iconic endurance events and top-tier clubs, is dedicated to helping individuals achieve their health goals. The company is offering early registration exclusively to its members for the upcoming year. Based in CHANHASSEN, Minn., Life Time (NYSE: LTH) is committed to promoting a healthy lifestyle. The early registration offer is slated to begin on Jan. 16, 2026. This initiative aims to support members in reaching their health and fitness goals for what promises to be their healthiest and happiest year yet.

data.title: CFACT criticizes judge approving VA wind project despite Pentagon concerns. Activist judges show bias. Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: Federal judges with activist tendencies are once more accused of showing prejudice against policies of the Trump administration. In a recent development on January 16, 2026, a coalition of public interest groups engaged in a legal battle to halt the construction of a large offshore wind project in Virginia, expressed strong opposition towards...

data.title: Annexon granted equity awards to 2 new non-executive employees as inducements under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Annexon, Inc., based in Brisbane, California, revealed on Jan. 16, 2026, that they have awarded equity inducements to two new non-executive employees as per the 2022 Employment Inducement Award Plan. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ANNX, focuses on developing targeted immunotherapies for neuroinflammatory diseases affecting around 10 million individuals globally. The equity grants were officially sanctioned on Jan. 9, 2026, in adherence to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Granite REIT (TSX: GRT.UN) declares CDN $0.2958 per unit distribution for Jan. 2026, to be paid on Feb. 13, to record unitholders as of Jan. 30.
data.description: In Toronto, Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: GRT.UN) declared a distribution of CDN $0.2958 per unit for January 2026. The distribution will be paid on February 13, 2026, to unitholders of record on January 30, 2026. This distribution does not count as effectively connected income for U.S. federal tax.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to $410.6M GS Mortgage-Backed Securities Trust 2026-NQM1, sponsored by Goldman Sachs. 100% FRM.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage-backed certificates from GS Mortgage-Backed Securities Trust 2026-NQM1 (GSMBS 2026-NQM1). The $410.6 million RMBS transaction, sponsored by Goldman Sachs Mortgage Company, consists of a pool of 1,076 fixed-rate residential mortgages (100.0% FRM). The transaction includes a significant concentration of collateral.
Markwayne Mullin recently disclosed 31 new stock trades including ICE, CRM, COF, CAT, JPM.

data.title: DPM Metals Inc. files technical report for Rakita Camp prospects in Serbia, supporting Inferred Mineral Resource estimate.
data.description: DPM Metals Inc. (TSX: DPM, ASX: DPM) revealed that the Company submitted a technical report for its Dumitru Potok, Rakita North, and Frasen prospects in Serbia, intending to back the Inferred Mineral Resource estimate disclosed in their December 2, 2025 news release. This move aims to provide detailed analysis and validation for the mineral reserves in those areas. The company's registration number is ARBN: 689370894.

data.title: AlphaGen completes private funding round, raising $2.5M.
data.description: Last month, a record-breaking 3,000 new COVID-19 cases were reported in the country, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 50,000. Health officials stated that the rise in cases can be attributed to increased testing efforts. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 700, with 20 new fatalities reported. The government has announced new restrictions and guidelines to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limits on social gatherings. Critics are concerned about the strain on the healthcare system as hospitals are reaching full capacity. Authorities urge the public to adhere to safety measures to prevent further spikes in infections.
PJM PROPOSES BACKSTOP PLAN TO SUPPORT POWER GRID RELIABILITY

data.title: Energizer Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ENR) to report Q1 FY 2026 results on Feb 5, with investor conference call at 10 AM.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Energizer Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ENR) announced that it will unveil its First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 financial outcomes on February 5, before the market opens. The company is set to hold an investor conference call, which will be live-streamed at 10 a.m.

data.title: Fastenal announces $0.24 dividend per share paid on Feb 26, 2026, to shareholders of record on Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) announced a dividend of $0.24 per share, payable in cash on February 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 29, 2026. Since 1991, the company has been paying annual dividends, added semi-annual dividends in 2003, and started quarterly dividends in 2011. The dividend declaration was made by the board of directors. This information was shared in a recent press release from the company.

data.title: TomaGold partners with Dig Media Inc. for 12-month marketing campaign to boost investor awareness.(IConfiguration from Investing News Network)
data.description: In Montreal, TOMAGOLD CORPORATION (TSXV: LOT; OTCPK: TOGOF) has partnered with Dig Media Inc. (dba Investing News Network) based in Vancouver, Canada, for an advertising and investor awareness campaign. INN, in operation since 2007, aims to offer unbiased news and educational content to investors. The agreement, spanning 12 months, involves INN promoting TomaGold to enhance its visibility. No investor relations services are included in the partnership.
